params.scene_type: La Estación de Bomberos (The Fire Station)

params.dialogue_1_en: Hello, what can I get for you?
params.dialogue_2_en: I'd like the chicken tacos, please.
params.dialogue_2_cn: Quisiera los tacos de pollo, por favor.
params.dialogue_4_cn: Un vaso de agua, por favor.

params.topic_english: Asking for Directions in a City
params.dialogue_1_en: Excuse me, how do I get to the main square?
params.dialogue_1_cn: Disculpe, ¿cómo llego a la plaza principal?
params.dialogue_2_en: Go straight for two blocks, then turn right.
params.dialogue_2_cn: Vaya recto dos cuadras y luego gire a la derecha.
params.dialogue_4_en: No, it's just a five-minute walk.
params.dialogue_4_cn: No, está a solo cinco minutos a pie.

params.topic_english: Shopping for Clothes at a Store
params.dialogue_1_en: Can I help you find anything?
params.dialogue_2_en: Yes, I'm looking for a blue shirt.
params.dialogue_2_cn: Sí, estoy buscando una camisa azul.
params.dialogue_4_cn: Necesito una talla mediana, por favor.

params.dialogue_1_en: Hello! What can I get for you today?
params.dialogue_2_en: Hi, I'd like an iced Americano, please.
params.dialogue_2_cn: 안녕하세요, 아이스 아메리카노 한 잔 주세요.
params.dialogue_3_en: Would you like a small, medium, or large?
params.dialogue_3_cn: 스몰, 미디움, 라지 중에 어떤 사이즈로 드릴까요?

params.dialogue_1_en: Excuse me, how do I get to the Seoul Tower?
params.dialogue_2_en: Go straight two blocks, then turn left. It'll be on your right.
params.dialogue_2_cn: 두 블록 직진한 다음, 왼쪽으로 도세요. 오른쪽에 있을 거예요.
params.dialogue_3_en: Straight two blocks, then left. Got it. Thank you!
params.dialogue_3_cn: 두 블록 직진, 그리고 왼쪽. 알겠습니다. 감사합니다!
params.dialogue_4_en: You're welcome. Have a good time!

params.dialogue_1_en: Hey, what are you doing this Saturday?
params.dialogue_1_cn: 야, 이번 주 토요일에 뭐 해?
params.dialogue_2_cn: 별로 없어, 그냥 쉬고 있어. 왜?
params.dialogue_3_en: Wanna watch a movie together? There's a new action film out.
params.dialogue_3_cn: 영화 같이 볼래? 새로운 액션 영화가 나왔어.
params.dialogue_4_en: Sounds great! What time should we meet?

params.word_1_cn: ありがとうございます

params.dialogue_1_en: What can I get for you today?
params.dialogue_1_cn: 本日は何にされますか？
params.dialogue_2_en: Can I get a medium latte, please?
params.dialogue_2_cn: ミディアムラテをお願いします。
params.dialogue_3_cn: 他に何かございますか？
params.dialogue_4_cn: いいえ、それだけです。ありがとうございます！

params.dialogue_1_en: Excuse me, how do I get to the station?
params.dialogue_1_cn: すみません、駅へはどう行けばいいですか？
params.dialogue_2_cn: この道をまっすぐ行ってください。
params.dialogue_4_cn: いいえ、徒歩5分くらいです。
